description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 21 (Tuesday, Reiwa 6), we received the 'Aoshin "TASUKI" Donation Fund' from Ome Shinkin Bank.

This donation program was established to support the future of children who drive regional development. Through donations, it aims to provide support to children and families raising children. The bank has been making annual donations since fiscal year 2023.

We will use this donation as funding to provide 'Baby Smile Coupons' — vouchers that parents of newborns (age 0) can use to purchase childcare items and related goods.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13482.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Receives donation from Ome Shinkin Bank
